channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Accenture cyber leads: why hiring more people won’t solve the cybersecurity talent gap
item.description: The workforce gap is a capability problem, not a headcount issue. Business leaders must act before the next breach.

item.title: Melinda French Gates’ advice to new IPO millionaires: ‘Give half your money away’
item.description: Upcoming IPOs from SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic will create new millionaires and billionaires who must decide how to use their wealth.

item.title: Jamie Dimon says remote work breeds ‘rope-a-dope politics’ and stunts young workers’ growth
item.description: Jamie Dimon said remote work leaves younger workers less engaged and less developed because it doesn't foster growth.

item.title: U.S. commits $1.2 trillion to infrastructure, but oversight remains lacking
item.description: A data center secretly used 29 million gallons in drought-stricken Georgia. Digital twins could have detected it instantly.
